# Casper AgentVault

> Unified smart wallet for agentic DeFi and RWA on Casper Network. Live at https://casperagent.xyz

AgentVault connects a Casper wallet via CSPR.click and runs three modules — Portfolio Guardian, RWA Oracle, and Agent Marketplace. Every action consults an AI agent (optional LLM), builds a mock/RPC/on-chain operation, and returns transaction feedback.

## Pages

- https://casperagent.xyz/ — Main dashboard: wallet connect, three module tabs, on-chain actions
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs — Product introduction and module overview
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/getting-started — Connect wallet and run first actions
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/faucet — Casper Wallet setup and testnet CSPR faucet
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/guardian — Portfolio Guardian module (scan, rebalance sim, risk log)
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/rwa — RWA Oracle module (submit, verify, publish attestations)
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/marketplace — Agent Marketplace module (browse, post job, release escrow)
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/architecture — System architecture and action pipeline
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/contracts — Escrow and Attestation smart contracts on casper-test

## When to read

- Use `/` for the live product and wallet-connected workflows.
- Use `/docs/getting-started` before first use.
- Use `/docs/contracts` and `/docs/architecture` for integration or audit context.
